prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mitsubishi-sourced 4G63T (2.0L turbo, 85mm bore, 88mm stroke) with forged internals (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a Garrett GT3076R turbo (0.76 A/R, 62mm inducer) running 22psi on E85, paired with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU and a custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping system from TurboSmart

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.5-way) in the OEM 5-speed transmission, upgraded CV axles from Driveshaft Shop (3.5" chromoly), and a Fidanza aluminum flywheel (8.5lb) with a South Bend Stage 3 clutch (ceramic puck, 6-pad)

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/25mm rear drop), Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow), and polyurethane bushings (Whiteline rear subframe, SuperPro front control arms) for chassis rigidity
estetica: Liberty Walk LB03 widebody kit (FRP construction, 50mm front/70mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber side skirts and a duckbill rear wing (Seibon 3K twill, 4-layer construction) mounted on a custom aluminum subframe

Full custom front bumper with integrated DRLs (Lux H8 5500K, 30W per side) and a carbon fiber splitter (VIS Racing, 3" overhang) paired with a custom rear diffuser (3D-printed PETG, 5-fin design) and a titanium exhaust tip (Injen 4" dual-wall)

Interior stripped and reupholstered with Bride Zeta III seats (fixed-back, 12kg each) in Alcantara (Korean-sourced, custom red stitching), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a custom roll cage (Chromoly 4130, 6-point, TIG-welded) with bolt-in door bars
